nasb.text: Whatever exists has already been named, and it is known what man is; for he cannot dispute with him who is stronger than he is.

esv.text: Whatever has come to be has already been named, and it is known what man is, and that he is not able to dispute with one stronger than he.

cnv.text: 已經存在的，早已有了名稱；大家都知道人是怎樣的；人絕對無法與比自己強的抗辯。

ccb.text: 一切存在的事物都已有了名字，人的本质也被识透了；人无法与比他更强的较量。

csbs.text: 已经有的，早就起了名；人是怎样，谁都知道，他不能与比自己强大的争辩。
